author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Add a new version of the Forward system for the Phase2 scenario, including a new forward shielding system

#### PR validation:

The new shielding system has been tested to have no overlaps. 

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Nothing special
title: Phase2-gex207 Add a new version of Forward system for the Phase2 scenario including a new forward shielding system
